scenarios.description: clone() deep copies element attributes and modifications to clone do not affect original
scenarios.precondition: Document has a custom attribute on root element
scenarios.expectedResult: Clone has same attribute value; changing clone attribute does not change original
pseudocode: TEST TC05 clone preserves and isolates attributes

scenarios.description: clone() does not copy a non-null connection; clone.connection() returns new session independent of original
scenarios.precondition: Document has an explicit Connection set
scenarios.expectedResult: Original connection preserved; clone.connection() returns a new session instance
pseudocode: TEST TC06 clone resets connection field

scenarios.description: clone() copies and isolates quirksMode; changing clone quirksMode does not affect original
scenarios.expectedResult: Clone has same quirksMode initially; modifying clone's quirksMode does not change original
pseudocode: TEST TC07 clone copies and isolates quirksMode
